nasb.text: Even one of the sons of Joiada, the son of Eliashib the high priest, was a son-in-law of Sanballat the Horonite, so I drove him away from me.

esv.text: And one of the sons of Jehoiada, the son of Eliashib the high priest, was the son-in-law of Sanballat the Horonite. Therefore I chased him from me.

cnv.text: 大祭司以利亞實的孫子耶何耶大的一個兒子，是和倫人參巴拉的女婿，我就驅逐他離開我。

ccb.text: 以利亚实大祭司的孙子、耶何耶大的一个儿子娶了和伦人参巴拉的女儿，我就把他赶了出去。
